summary: Iran closed Strait of Hormuz (March 2026), disrupting ~20M bbl/day (27% of global maritime oil trade). Brent above $100/bbl (first time since Aug 2022). U.S.-Iran talks stalled. Trump preparing extended Iran blockade. IMF cut global growth to 3.1%. S&P 500 had -9% then +12% swing. Energy sector top-performing sector YTD (+40%).
